name_en: Pink 🎉 New Prada nylon Hobo handbag/crossbody bag 😘😘 The hobo style that went viral among internet influencers is back with a new design! 👏👏 This Hobo bag has a great design 👍👍 Multi-functional 😘😘 Waist bag/Shoulder bag/Single strap 👍👍 Handles replaced with chains, adding a touch of sexiness as a shoulder bag, and comes with a long strap. The best part is the strap has a small charm (mini bag) that can also be used to hang other bags or on the waist as an accessory 🙊🙊 Goes with any outfit 😘😘 Ladies, hurry up and get one, it's so beautiful 🙊🙊 Model: 1BH204, Size: 22x12x6cm
